## 結果:70 個 `.c` 檔案直接 `#include "server.h"`

透過 `grep -rl '^#include[[:space:]]*"server\.h"' --include="*.c" .` 在 repo 中搜尋(只比對開頭即為 `#include "server.h"` 的行,避免誤抓含在字串裡的情況),全部都位於 `src/` 目錄下:

```
src/acl.c            src/eval.c            src/rdb.c
src/aof.c             src/evict.c           src/redis-check-aof.c
src/bio.c             src/expire.c          src/redis-check-rdb.c
src/bitops.c          src/fwtree.c          src/replication.c
src/blocked.c         src/gcra.c            src/resp_parser.c
src/call_reply.c      src/hotkeys.c         src/rio.c
src/childinfo.c       src/hyperloglog.c     src/script_lua.c
src/cluster_asm.c     src/iothread.c        src/script.c
src/cluster_legacy.c  src/keymeta.c         src/sentinel.c
src/cluster.c         src/latency.c         src/server.c
src/commands.c        src/lazyfree.c        src/slowlog.c
src/config.c          src/logreqres.c       src/socket.c
src/connection.c      src/lolwut.c          src/sort.c
src/crc16.c           src/lolwut5.c         src/sparkline.c
src/db.c              src/lolwut6.c         src/sparsearray.c
src/debug.c           src/lolwut8.c         src/syncio.c
src/defrag.c          src/memory_prefetch.c src/t_array.c
src/entry.c           src/module.c          src/t_hash.c
src/estore.c          src/multi.c           src/t_list.c
                       src/networking.c      src/t_set.c
                       src/notify.c          src/t_stream.c
                       src/object.c          src/t_string.c
                       src/pubsub.c          src/t_zset.c
                                              src/threads_mngr.c
                                              src/timeout.c
                                              src/tls.c
                                              src/tracking.c
                                              src/unix.c
```

共計 **70** 個檔案(`server.h` 本身位於 `src/server.h`,未計入)。
